user.title: Connect to Häfele Mesh Gateway
user.description: Choose how you want to configure the MQTT connection to your Häfele Mesh network.

automatic.title: Automatic Setup (Mosquitto)
automatic.description: A secure MQTT user will be created automatically in the Mosquitto Add-on. You will receive credentials to enter in your Häfele Mesh Connect app on the next screen.

manual.title: Manual MQTT Configuration
manual.description: Configure the MQTT broker connection manually if you are using an external broker or custom settings.

data_description.mqtt_broker: The IP address or hostname of your MQTT broker.
data_description.topic_prefix: The base topic used by your Häfele Mesh Gateway (default: Mesh).

show_credentials.title: MQTT Credentials Generated

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the MQTT broker. Please check your settings and availability.
error.mqtt_broker_required: MQTT broker host is required when not using Home Assistant MQTT.
error.ha_mqtt_not_connected: Home Assistant MQTT broker is not connected.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.

abort.already_configured: This Häfele Mesh gateway is already configured.
